prompt: Change the progress bar colors to reflect different urgency levels: red for urgent, yellow for moderate, and green for on track.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In each of the eight project cards displayed on the dashboard, modify the color of the grey horizontal progress bar. The color of each progress bar should reflect its urgency level: change the bar to red if the project is urgent, yellow if it is moderately urgent, and green if it is on track.
objects: Horizontal progress bars (with colors reflecting urgency: red, yellow, or green)
Project titles and details within cards
